opportunities.title: Godzilla Stats for Your Table: Running a Kaiju Without Breaking Legendary Resistance
opportunities.why_now: Marvel Multiverse RPG just added an official Godzilla stat block, giving a hard data point to compare against how 5e/Shadowdark handle city-scale monsters.
opportunities.angle: Rules ruling short: break down how to scale a kaiju's action economy, damage thresholds, and 'ignore this or the fight ends in one round' legendary resistance math for 5e/DCC.

opportunities.title: Fallout 5 Is Coming — Here's the 5e Ruling for Radiation Poisoning Nobody Uses Right
opportunities.why_now: Bethesda just confirmed Fallout 3/NV remasters and Fallout 5 pre-production, reviving post-apoc RPG interest right when tables are hacking wasteland one-shots.
opportunities.angle: Mechanical breakdown: how to actually run radiation/mutation exhaustion tracks in 5e or DCC without homebrewing a whole new subsystem, cite Gamma World/MCC precedent.

opportunities.title: Professor Dungeon Master Just Talked Deathbringer — Here's the DCC Ruling He Skipped
opportunities.why_now: PDM's interview on Deathbringer is fresh OSR/DCC-adjacent news this week and the audience overlaps hard with a DCC-focused shorts channel.
opportunities.angle: Wry commentary short reacting to a specific ruling/mechanic from the interview, correcting or expanding on it in classic dry-GM voice.

opportunities.title: Monte Cook Is Adapting Between Earth and Sky — Here's Why Fiction-to-Crunch Conversions Usually Break
opportunities.why_now: MCG just announced the Between Earth and Sky novel-to-TTRPG deal, a timely hook for talking about the mechanical pitfalls of adapting prose worldbuilding into stat blocks.
opportunities.angle: Veteran-GM teardown: pick one iconic novel creature/power and show the ruling/spell-use-case translation into game terms, using this as the case study.

opportunities.title: Lies of P's Puppet Hero Is a Better Warforged Than Your Warforged
opportunities.why_now: Lies of P: Complete Edition's Switch 2 trailer is trending this week, giving a pop-culture hook to talk about construct-race rulings that GMs constantly get wrong.
opportunities.angle: Creature/race tactic short: correct immunities (poison, exhaustion, sleep) and social-interaction edge cases for construct PCs in 5e/Shadowdark using Lies of P as the reference image.
